_note: Canonical NON-SECRET tenant identity for the region-profile Apps Script project 'PCR Automation' (the deploying instance is Pacific Region; scriptId 1s2Fmdo0sxWjuPawYBU_dCGYa5qA0h8LuGbQkIGzptzhBlTqL14JqW-T0). These map 1:1 to Script Properties consumed by getTenantConfig_() in src/config.gs. Secrets (SA_PRIVATE_KEY, CAPWATCH_AUTHORIZATION) are NOT stored here. This file is repo-only; .claspignore keeps config-tenants/ out of every clasp push. The shared src/ has been pushed to this project (2026-07-17); see docs/REGION_DIFF.md.
_profile_note: TENANT_PROFILE=region selects the single-unit region profile in config.gs (org-path sync and squadron groups off). No AEM automation, all senior members typed INDEFINITE. Formerly 'pacific' — the live project may still read TENANT_PROFILE=pacific, which config.gs's PROFILE_ALIASES_ transparently maps to 'region'. See docs/REGION_DIFF.md.
_xt_note: Cross-tenant contacts is OFF for the region profile (RUN_INBOUND=false; no peer tenant). No XT_PEER_* Script Properties are needed on this project.
_personal_address_note: The retention, director-of-recruiting, test and sender-name values on this tenant are an individual role-holder's mailbox and personal display name, so they are deliberately BLANK here rather than version-controlled — set them directly in Script Properties on the project. Blank fields are skipped by setupRegionScriptProperties(), so re-running this never clears an existing value. NOTE TENANT_SENDER_NAME is a display string that appears on outbound member-facing mail; if the role-holder changes, update the Script Property or the mail will still carry the previous person's name.
